events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need diagnose fault. Scenario: residential concrete finishing & curing, in-service, observed no cure (blankets/compound absent in photo). References ACI 302, 308. Need decision fail because non-compliant/dangerous? Curing absence leads to degraded concrete (surface defects, reduced strength, cracking). Need component conditions maybe degraded, failed? Since in-service, likely degraded. Could be failed if severe. But observed only no cure absent; most likely fault is inadequate curing causing premature drying, plastic shrinkage cracking, reduced durability. Decision fail because non-compliant with ACI 308 requiring curing. Risk medium/high. Need fill fields. percent_complete 100 (in-service). value 0. sound_source etc empty? Schema says string for sound_source, event_time, rate numeric. Use empty string and 0. order empty list, workable empty list. findings: no curing compound/blankets applied; concrete surface dried prematurely; non-compliance with ACI 308. actions: verify concrete strength/durability, apply remedial curing/moisture retention if feasible, evaluate surface defects, repair cracks/spalls, ensure future curing per ACI 308. references: ACI 302.1R, ACI 308.1, ACI 308R. Need JSON valid. Ensure no prose outside.

events.label: response
events.text:
{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "high",
  "work_stage": "in-service",
  "component_conditions": ["degraded", "non-compliant"],
  "percent_complete": 100,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 0.85,
  "event_time": 0,
  "rate": 0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "No curing blankets or curing compound present on the finished concrete surface.",
    "Concrete appears to have been placed and finished without an approved curing method.",
    "In-service slab is likely suffering from excessive moisture loss, plastic shrinkage cracking, and reduced surface durability.",
    "Condition is non-compliant with ACI 308 curing requirements."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Inspect the slab for visible cracking, dusting, scaling, and reduced surface strength.",
    "Perform rebound hammer or core testing if structural adequacy is in question.",
    "Repair surface defects and seal/control cracks as needed.",
    "For future placements, apply a curing compound, wet curing, or insulating blankets per ACI 308 immediately after final finishing.",
    "Document the deficiency and notify the responsible party."
  ],
  "rationale": "ACI 308 requires concrete to be cured immediately after finishing to retain moisture and promote proper hydration. The absence of any curing medium (blankets or compound) on an in-service residential slab indicates inadequate curing, which commonly causes plastic shrinkage cracking, reduced strength, and surface degradation. Because the work is non-compliant and the slab is already in service, the condition is a fail.",
  "references": [
    "ACI 302.1R - Guide for Concrete Floor and Slab Construction",
    "ACI 308.1 - Specification for Curing Concrete",
    "ACI 308R - Guide to External Curing of Concrete"
  ]
}
